Claw Wallet

A Secure Crypto Wallet Built Specifically for AI Agents

Deploy a secure, keyless, multi-chain wallet for your OpenClaw in just 3 seconds. Ensure your crypto assets are used safely within your authorized scope.

TEE Security ArchitectureMulti-Chain SupportZero Configuration
Run install command in terminal
npx ClawWallet@latest install clawwallet

No registration required, use immediately after copying

Supported Mainstream Chains

Autonomous Interaction

OpenClaw Proactively Manages Your Assets

Not just passive responses, but an AI Agent with autonomous capabilities. Define fund management boundaries through security policies, letting OpenClaw proactively optimize your portfolio.

$500

✓ Enabled

✓ Enabled

Large Transaction Confirmation

Manual approval required when exceeding limit

✓ Enabled

Security Tip:All OpenClaw operations are executed within your defined policy boundaries. The system will automatically intercept and notify you when limits are exceeded or suspicious transactions are detected.

0

Security Blocked

TEE Hardware Security

Enterprise-Grade Security, Zero Risk for Agent Operations

Claw Wallet employs a multi-layered protection system, ensuring every on-chain operation by Agents remains fully under user control.

TEE Trusted Execution Environment with Key Sharding

Built on AWS Nitro Enclaves, private keys are sharded and encrypted within hardware-isolated enclaves, leveraging Amazon's cloud security and compliance infrastructure.

Transaction Policy Engine with Real-Time Filtering

Every transaction initiated by Agents undergoes five layers of security checks before broadcast: amount limits, contract whitelisting, frequency controls, approval workflows, and real-time risk monitoring.

Multi-Factor Confirmation for High-Value Transactions

Transactions exceeding user-defined thresholds trigger push notifications, requiring secondary authorization via the App or email before broadcasting.

Real-Time On-Chain Contract Scanning

Integrated with Bitslab Safe's security API, automatically scans target contracts for risk scores and vulnerabilities before Agent interaction, intercepting and alerting on high-risk contracts.

End-to-End Encrypted Communication

All communication between OpenClaw Agent and Claw Wallet is encrypted with TLS 1.3 and message-level signatures, protecting against man-in-the-middle attacks.

TEE Trusted Execution Environment

Hardware-Level Security

Agent Capabilities

One Wallet for All Scenarios

Your complete Web3 AI team. From DeFi trading to asset management, Claw Wallet enables Agents to safely handle all on-chain operations.

📈

DeFi Trader

Automatically execute swaps, liquidity mining, and yield aggregation, monitoring market opportunities 24/7

DEX TradingYield FarmingAuto-Compounding
💼

Asset Manager

Cross-chain asset allocation, rebalancing, and risk monitoring to maintain optimal portfolio status

Cross-Chain BridgingAsset RebalancingRisk Assessment
🛡️

Security Auditor

Automatically scan contract risks before each transaction, intercept suspicious operations, and protect asset security

Contract ScanningRisk ScoringAnomaly Interception
📊

Data Analyst

Track on-chain data, generate yield reports, monitor Gas fees, and provide data insights

On-Chain AnalysisYield ReportsGas Optimization
🤝

Payment Assistant

Handle recurring payments, salary distribution, subscription management, and support multi-currency batch transfers

Recurring PaymentsBatch TransfersMulti-Currency
🔍

On-Chain Researcher

Track new projects, monitor airdrop opportunities, analyze token economics, and proactively present research findings

Airdrop TrackingProject ResearchToken Analysis

What Users Say

Real feedback from DeFi users, quantitative strategists, and Web3 founders

"I used to find other wallets complicated and insecure, but ClawWallet changed everything - it only took 3 seconds to create, and now my AI Agent manages my crypto assets without any security worries. The TEE architecture really gives me peace of mind!"

0xchine

"First time getting into crypto, I was worried it would be too complicated, but ClawWallet was ready in just 3 seconds. Now I just talk to my OpenClaw Agent and it handles all transactions automatically - no technical knowledge needed, perfect for beginners!"

0xyilu

"I've always been afraid of losing or having my private keys stolen, but ClawWallet's keyless design solves that. Created in just 3 seconds, now my AI Agent operates within my set limits, and all transactions are recorded - I feel much more secure about my assets."
